The '''sludge panther''' was a dangerous [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] predator native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].<ref name="SoF" /> The sludge panthers lived in swamps and dank jungles of Talus. They often rolled around in mud to mask its scent when hunting.<ref name="SWG:SP" /> They lived in small packs, females usually hunted for food while males protected the nests and young from predators.<ref name="SoF" /> A larger [[Subspecies/Legends|subspecies]] of the common sludge panther was the greater sludge panther.<ref name="SWG" /> The sludge panther was distantly related to the [[Corellian sand panther/Legends|Corellian sand panther]].<ref name="SWG:SP" />

==History==
Prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a large pack of sludge panthers attacked and overran the village of [[Durbin]] on Talus, killing most of its inhabitants.<ref name="SWG:LVoD">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Lost Village of Durbin|Talus}}</ref>
